title: Bulk move boards
excerpt:

posts.author: christi (Christi)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve had a few folks accidently import boards into our default workspace. This is creating confusion and has some privacy concerns.

As ad admin I’d love the ability to

  • Identify who imported/owns a board
  • Bulk move boards from one workspace to another (not move boards individually)

posts.author: JeremyJones (Jeremy Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we solve this please, if we can change the primary workspace to another workspace at least we can delete the imported issues.

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Christi (@christi),

Arun here from Decadis AG – monday marketplace partner. We understand the pain of being a board admin and it can be overwhelming at times. And every admin needs a hero right? That’s why we have created Batch Hero for monday to do heavy lifting for you.

Let me show how Batch Hero effortlessly handles your use case!

With Batch Hero, you achieve:

  • Column Ops: smart column management – Effortlessly add, duplicate, or remove columns across multiple boards instantly.
  • Board Ops: streamlined board operations – Move, copy, archive, delete, or change ownership of multiple boards with just a few clicks.
  • Quick actions at your command: Quickly create or rename boards, plus filter and sort them with lightning speed.
  • Control panel for boards: Access key board information from one convenient, centralized location.

And the best part? The app is still free!

Give it a try: Batch Hero for monday - monday.com App Marketplace

If you have further questions or would like to discuss your requirements with us, do not hesitate to reach out!

Best,
Arun
